exam_name: NVIDIA-Certified Associate: Generative AI and LLMs
exam_format: Online labs + project for DLI; proctored exam for NCP levels

testing_centers.provider: NVIDIA Deep Learning Institute (DLI) or authorized partners (Pearson VUE for some proctored exams)
testing_centers.notes: Many NVIDIA certifications are earned through DLI courses with hands-on labs and project review. Proctored exams (NCP level) may use Pearson VUE or NVIDIA's platform. No traditional third-party centers for all; focus is on NVIDIA ecosystem training.

id_requirements: Government-issued photo ID for proctored exams. NVIDIA account required for DLI platform and certification records.
exam_rules: For DLI: complete labs and final project. For proctored: closed book unless specified, no external resources. NVIDIA emphasizes practical skills demonstrated in labs.
renewal_options: Recertification every 2 years via continuing education, new exam, or updated training. NVIDIA regularly updates portfolio for new hardware (Blackwell, etc.) and software (CUDA 12+, TensorRT-LLM).

retake_policy.notes: Varies by exam level. DLI projects can often be resubmitted after feedback.

aliases: nvidia-certified associate generative ai and llms
